commands: backend: python manage.py test signal_intake.tests.Adr009BoundaryGuardTests intelligence execution.tests_notification_transport wims
backend: python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run execution intelligence
expected_results: A single CanonicalTradeResult carries all required fields (facts + signal/parser provenance + execution context + statistics + result-card/caption references).
Two renderers (Telegram text, WIMS card+caption) format FROM the canonical object; there is exactly one result-card/caption implementation (no duplicated formatting).
The deployed Telegram dry-run envelope is byte-for-byte preserved now that it is sourced from the canonical object.
ingest_winning_trade builds its media via the canonical object + WIMSRenderer with no change to the WIMS media output.
ADR-009 preserved: intelligence imports NO execution app (linkage flows execution -> intelligence as a plain dict via resolve_signal_linkage on the execution side).
canonical.py + renderers.py transmit nothing, order nothing, publish nothing; the dispatcher/transport are unchanged (still dry-run, transmitted=False); no notification routing change; no E3.
No model/migration change; full backend suite green; governance + secret-scan pass.
actual_results: intelligence.tests_canonical: Ran 8 tests OK — canonical field mapping (symbol/direction/fills/exit/pips/gross+net pnl/outcome/reference_entry/SL/TP/provider/parser/confidence/execution_mode/signal_id/is_demo/account_label/statistics); execution-side resolver reads the plan; TelegramRenderer wording; WIMSRenderer card+caption; WIMSRenderer requires with_media; Telegram envelope regression (byte-for-byte); light build renders no media; ADR-009 + no-transmit/order/publish AST boundary.
signal_intake.tests.Adr009BoundaryGuardTests + intelligence + execution.tests_notification_transport + wims: Ran 72 tests OK (ADR-009 guard passes; Telegram + WIMS behaviour preserved).
Full backend suite: Ran 475 tests OK (474 + 1 post-review regression test).
makemigrations --check execution intelligence: No changes detected. make governance-check OK; secret-scan OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.

Adversarial 4-lens review (behaviour-preservation / adr009-boundary / single-source-correctness / transmit-order-publish-boundary, 5 agents) + opus synthesis: decision FIX with 1 must-fix. ADR-009 clean, no transmit/order/publish, transport still dry-run, WIMS media preserved. Must-fix APPLIED: the strategy field had gained a provider-slug fallback the deployed envelope never had (reachable when plan.source empty + provider slug set) — dropped it so strategy = signal_source OR plan.source exactly, + regression test. Two nits accepted-not-changed (caption pip calc + delivery guard _net_pnl are pre-existing; changing them would risk the WIMS output or render a loser's card before the reject-guard).
limitations: Repo-only. No deployment, no transport change, no real Telegram send, no WIMS publish added, no notification routing change, no E3, no order. The Telegram transport remains DRY-RUN.

This packet unifies the DATA/format source; a REAL transport (RealTelegramTransport + selector + secrets) and the social renderers are separate future packets. The canonical object is ready for them (only a renderer + transport is added).

For the DEMO the message wording is still DRAFT (contract, not final copy). The result card is attached only on the WIMS/with_media path; wiring the card into a future real Telegram message is a transport-packet concern.

A minor, pre-existing data-prep duplication remains (_aggregate in canonical vs _aggregate_trade in delivery) — this is aggregation, not formatting; the packet's 'no duplicate formatting logic' (card/caption/text) is met.
